_meta.name: Phoenix Omega — Animagine XL 4.0 txt2img + cubiq PuLID (manga panel; shojo/iyashikei/healing register)
_meta.description: Animagine XL 4.0 base (RAIL++-M; commercial-clean per audit license_risk_register_2026-04-29.md). Anime-tuned strong attractor — best for shojo/iyashikei/healing/slice_of_life genres where the attractor MATCHES the desired register. SDXL dual-encoder (CLIP-L + CLIP-G); responds well to Danbooru-style booru tag prompts. cubiq/PuLID_ComfyUI for SDXL identity lock; ensure FaceNet variant at runtime (NOT InsightFace AntelopeV2). 1024x1280 portrait default (SDXL native ratio); upscale to 1080x1920 if webtoon vertical needed.
_meta.license_notes: Animagine XL 4.0 RAIL++-M (commercial OK); cubiq/PuLID_ComfyUI Apache 2.0 with FaceNet path
